title: andrographis affinis
intro: Andrographis affinis, also known as the Himalayan King of Bitters, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region and is closely related to Andrographis paniculata, commonly known as Kalmegh. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Andrographis affinis are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive disorders. Andrographis affinis is often used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
